trades.reasoning: Top screener score of 95 with RSI at 69.7 — bullish momentum zone without being overbought — plus a confirmed MACD bullish crossover and price 4.7% above SMA-20, making it the best risk/reward entry today.
Score 90 large-cap quality with RSI 65.1 leaving meaningful room before overbought, MACD bullish, and structural AI chip demand provides a fundamental floor beneath the technical setup.

decisions.briefing: Markets posted quiet gains in a neutral session — NASDAQ +0.4%, S&P 500 +0.3% — with no major dislocations. Deploying remaining cash into HCC (highest momentum score on the screener) and NVDA (quality large-cap with room to run) to fill two of four open slots. Existing six positions show no stop-loss or profit-target triggers, so they hold.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher on June 1, 2026, with the S&P 500 up 0.3% and the NASDAQ gaining 0.4% in a low-volatility session lacking major catalysts. Investor sentiment remained cautiously constructive as AI-driven tech demand continued to support growth names, while broader macro concerns around U.S. fiscal deficits and elevated Treasury yields kept gains in check. The session reflected a market in consolidation mode — digesting recent momentum rather than breaking out in either direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年6月1日，美國股市小幅收高，標普500指數漲0.3%，納斯達克指數漲0.4%，整體成交清淡，缺乏明確方向性催化劑。市場情緒審慎樂觀，人工智能相關需求持續為科技成長股提供支撐，但美國財政赤字問題及公債殖利率高企令升幅受限。整體呈現整固格局，投資者消化近期漲幅，觀望下一個方向性突破。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is the strategy of buying stocks showing strong recent price and technical strength on the premise that near-term winners tend to keep winning. Indicators like RSI (ideally 55–70), a bullish MACD crossover, and price trading above its moving average together confirm that buying pressure is sustained — not exhausted. The key risk is chasing an overextended move, which is why today's top pick HCC at RSI 69.7 is preferable to overbought names like GWRE at RSI 87.6.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略的核心邏輯是「強者恆強」，即買入近期技術面強勢的股票，押注短期漲勢延續。RSI介於55至70之間、MACD出現看漲交叉、股價站上均線，三者共同確認買盤持續而非衰竭。此策略最大的風險在於追高買入過度超買的標的，這也是為何今日首選RSI僅69.7的HCC，而非RSI已達87.6的GWRE——前者仍有上漲空間，後者回調風險明顯偏高。
